levelName: Level 56: For Loops - Sum of 1 to N
puzzleDescription: Learn how to use an 'accumulator' variable to calculate the total sum of numbers from 1 up to a given number N.
objective: Input a number N and calculate the sum of all numbers from 1 to N (e.g., if N=10, the sum is 55).
hints: Initialize your loop variable at 1: 'int i = 1;'.
Inside the loop, use 'sum += i;' to add each number to the total.
The loop should run while 'i <= n;'.
